name: Disculate
description: In-Discord calculator. Arithmetic, percentages, common math functions, and constants — no leaving the channel.
author: Disculate

options.name: expression
options.description: The expression to evaluate, e.g. (3 + 4) * sqrt(2)

options.name: ephemeral
options.description: If true, only you can see the result. Default false.

slash_commands.name: calc-config
slash_commands.description: Configure per-server calculator defaults. Server admin only.

options.name: scientific_threshold
options.description: Switch to scientific notation when magnitude exceeds 10^N (1-20).

slash_commands.name: calc-help
slash_commands.description: Show the list of supported operators, functions, and constants.
